provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Corporation Sole (Police Force) Order, 2012 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the first day of July, 2013.

provisions.title: Establish­ment of the Corpora­tion Sole
provisions.content: (1) There is hereby established a Corporation Sole within the Tanzania Police Force. (2) The Corporation Sole established under this Order shall be authorised to carry on such commercial and industrial enterprises in a manner specified in the Schedule to this Order.

provisions.title: Vesting of assets and properties
provisions.content: All properties and assets in relation to and in the inventory of the projects specified in paragraph 10 of the Schedule shall, without further assurance, vest into the Tanzania Police Force Corporation Sole. Schedule 1. Any activity for the purpose of improving the Tanzania Police Force infrastructure efficiency in policing and modernizing the Tanzania Police Force. 2. The business of building, civil works, electrical, specialized or any other type of contracting in accordance with the Contractors Registration Act . [Cap. 235] 3. The business of consulting engineering in accordance with the Engineers Registration Act. [Cap. 63] 4. The business of architecture and quantity surveying in accordance with the Architects and Quantity Surveyors Registration Act. [Cap. 269] 5. The business of public security services. 6. Training and provision of range grounds for public and private security for purposes of safety and legitimate handling of firearms. 7. Consultancy services in relating to activities under this schedule. 8. Promotion of recreation services and welfare for the Tanzania Police Force Staff. 9. Investment in any undertaking or business activity for the better carrying out of the objects of the Corporation Sole. 10. Maintenance, administration and management on commercial basis of the following projects: (a) Tanzania Police Building Unit, Kurasini, Dar es Salaam; (b) Oysterbay Police, Project - Dar es Salaam; (c) Police Range Grounds; (i) Malivundo Chalinze - Coast Region; (ii) Kidatu Police Academy - Morogoro; (iii) West Kilimanjaro - Siha; (d) Oysterbay Police Officers Mess - Dar es Salaam; (e) Quartermaster - Tailoring - Kurasini Dar es Salaam.
